impact: This advances the PP&D lifecycle requirement fixture validation by proving out-of-range confidence values are rejected while preserving the accepted checkbox-27a through checkbox-27d mutation coverage.
summary: Add the checkbox-27e confidence mutation test and replace confidence validation with explicit complete Python comparisons.
target_task: Task checkbox-35: Recovery for checkbox-27e: after checkbox-27d passes, add one mutation case for out-of-range `confidence` only. Use only complete Python comparisons: `if not isinstance(confidence, (int, float)):`, `if confidence > 1:`, and `if confidence

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
